title: Temporal Event Description Task Annotation
description: Dense video captioning task: given a temporal segment defined by [t1, t2], describe in natural language what happened during that segment.

version.description: Schema version - must be '3.0' for this schema

items.description: Array of temporal event description items, one per question-answer pair

video_id.description: Reference to video ID (matches directory name in contextual/)

video_type.description: High-level content classification of the video

t1.description: Segment start time in flexible timecode: MM:SS or HH:MM:SS with optional fractional seconds (e.g. '01:30', '00:01:30', '01:30.5')

t2.description: Segment end time in flexible timecode: MM:SS or HH:MM:SS with optional fractional seconds (e.g. '01:30', '00:01:30', '01:30.5')

question.description: Natural-language question asking what occurred in the video between t1 and t2 (e.g. 'What happened in the video between 00:00:02 and 00:00:08?')

answer.description: Natural-language description of the events that occurred in the segment [t1, t2]

reasoning.description: Optional step-by-step reasoning trace leading to the answer

metadata.description: File metadata for identification and cataloging

description.description: Human-readable description of this annotation file

license.description: License under which this annotation is distributed

tags.description: List of tags for categorization and search

items.question: What happened in the video between 00:00:02 and 00:00:06?
items.answer: A silver sedan initiates a left turn across oncoming traffic without yielding, causing a T-bone collision with a straight-moving vehicle. Simultaneously, a dark pickup truck is struck by a FedEx truck. By 00:00:06 the sedan has spun to a halt, the pickup has finished its clockwise rotation, and all surrounding traffic has come to a full stop.
items.reasoning: Between 00:00:02 and 00:00:06 two simultaneous failures occur at the intersection: the silver sedan turns left without checking for oncoming traffic, and the pickup erratically exits the queue. The resulting collisions unfold rapidly over four seconds before the scene stabilises.

metadata.description: Natural-language descriptions of anomalous traffic events within specified temporal segments
